programme.title: South Park VOSE: Pis
programme.desc: Los altos niveles de pis en la piscina provocan un desastre que les estropea el día a los chicos, especialmente a Kyle. La xenofobia de Cartman vuelve a salir a la luz.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Curación sexual
programme.desc: Kyle and Butters se encuentran en medio de los famosos más conocidos de EE. UU. cuando se someten a un tratamiento por adicción al sexo. Cartman y Stan están pegados al nuevo juego de Tiger Woods.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: La Historia del escroto McBolas de Moco
programme.sub-title: La Historia del escroto McBolas de Moco
programme.desc: Butters se lleva la culpa y la gloria después de que los chicos escribieran un libro que pretendía ser grosero pero que es aclamado como una obra maestra.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Pollo frito medicinal
programme.desc: Cartman se pone furioso cuando descubre que su restaurante favorito se ha convertido en un dispensario de marihuana medicinal. Randy está menos decepcionado.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Tienes 0 amigos
programme.desc: En contra de su juicio, Stan se hace Facebook y se convierte en un maestro de las redes sociales, lo que hace que la web le absorba.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Verano minusválido
programme.desc: En el campamento, con sus compañeros discapacitados, Jimmy no se da cuenta de los intentos de Nathan de matarlo. Los chicos organizan una intervención ya que a Toallín se le va de las manos lo de las drogas.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Pobre y estúpido
programme.desc: Cartman tiene una nueva ambición: quiere ser piloto de la NASCAR. ¿Podrá Cartman ganar la carrera de su vida?

programme.title: South Park VOSE: El origen
programme.desc: Mientras se encuentra en una sesión de terapia de grupo por almacenamiento compulsivo, Stan se queda atrapado en el sueño del consejero escolar, el Sr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Mapache 2: retrospectiva
programme.desc: El superhéroe vestido de mapache, El mapache, ha vuelto ¡y esta vez tiene amigos!

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Mysterion se subleva
programme.desc: Liderados por Mysterion, El mapache y sus amigos intentan ayudar a la gente en el golfo. Mientras, El mapache busca vengarse.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Mapache VS. Mapache y sus amigos
programme.sub-title: Mapache VS. Mapache y sus amigos
programme.desc: El mapache resulta ser incluso más malvado que el señor oscuro, Cthulhu, mientras se venga de sus antiguos socios.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Crema Fraiche
programme.desc: Molesto por la obsesión perversa de Randy con los programas de cocina, Stan pide ayuda a Gordon Ramsey. Jamie Oliver es menos útil.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Chistobot
programme.desc: Después de ser objeto de burlas en los premios de comedia del colegio de South Park, Alemania construye la máquina de la risa definitiva: Chistobot. Sin embargo, sus planes para la raza humana no funcionan muy bien.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: T.A.P
programme.desc: Después de un vergonzoso incidente que involucraba las partes de un chico, Cartman tiene que ir a terapia para gestionar la ira y Randy hace todo lo posible para lidiar con las consecuencias.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Asociación atlética de bebés drogadictos
programme.desc: Cuando Kyle descubre que Cartman se ofrece como voluntario con bebés drogadictos en el hospital, sus sospechas aumentan. ¿Qué papel juega Slash (de Guns 'n Roses) en todo esto?

programme.title: South Park VOSE: City Sushi
programme.desc: Butters se ve envuelto en una guerra territorial asiática y sus padres descubren que tiene múltiples personalidades, así que deciden que la medicación es la única respuesta.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Anoburguesas
programme.desc: La crisis existencial de Stan continúa, mientras que Cartman se mete en el negocio de las hamburguesas con un ingrediente secreto superespecial.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: El último de los mehicanos
programme.desc: Un juego de 'patrulla fronteriza' acaba mal y Butters termina reavivando el orgullo mexicano, pero Cartman no va a dejar que el juego se acabe ahí.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Indiscretos
programme.desc: El colegio de South Park es víctima de una página web de cotilleos y se lía pardísima. ¿Quién le pondrá solución? ¿Cartman o Gerbil King Lemmiwinks?

programme.title: South Park VOSE: 1 %
programme.desc: El 99 % está atacando a Eric Cartman.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Un día de Acción de Gracias del Canal Historia
programme.sub-title: Un día de Acción de Gracias del Canal Historia
programme.desc: Mientras que los chicos intentan aprenderlo todo sobre el Día de Acción de Gracias en el Canal Historia, se ven envueltos en un misterio que involucra a los extraterrestres, a Natalie Portman y al relleno del pavo.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: El niño pobre
programme.desc: A los padres de Kenny los arrestan y él acaba en un programa de acogida, haciendo que Cartman sea el nuevo niño más pobre del colegio. Mientras, una misteriosa figura enmascarada regresa del pasado.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Faithileo
programme.desc: El último meme en causar sensación en el pueblo es el 'faithileo', aunque se vuelve un poco desagradable después de un incidente que interrumpe un debate presidencial republicano.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: No debía haberme tirado por la tirolina
programme.sub-title: No debía haberme tirado por la tirolina
programme.desc: Los chicos están emocionados porque tienen por delante un peligroso día de tirolina en las montañas de Colorado, pero lo único que amenaza con matarlos es el aburrimiento.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Sarcasmoball
programme.desc: Randy hace un comentario sarcástico acerca de que el fútbol es demasiado peligroso para los niños. La cosa acaba con un deporte nacional que involucra sujetadores y un globo.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Subiendo los niveles
programme.desc: Cartman admite por fin que está gordo y obtiene inmediatamente un scooter de movilidad.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Inseguridad
programme.desc: Cartman se instala un sistema de seguridad en casa.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Volviéndose nativo
programme.desc: Es hora de que Butters comience un viaje en el que seguirá el camino de sus antepasados hawaianos.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Una pesadilla en Face Time
programme.desc: Los planes de Randy para la noche de Halloween hacen que Stan no pueda salir con sus amigos.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: Una scausa para aplaudir
programme.desc: Un grave escándalo de dopaje sacude la fe que tiene todo el mundo en un icono muy querido. Todos los que apoyaron una vez al héroe caído están cortando sus simbólicas pulseras amarillas.

programme.title: South Park VOSE: ¡Obama gana!
programme.desc: Eric Cartman oculta algo en su habitación que podría cambiar por completo los resultados de las elecciones.

programme.desc: In 2024, Pamela Wittman, a 25-year-old from Indiana, was identified as a victim in the 1980 Daytona Beach cold case linked to a serial killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Found shot near Highway 67 in 1986, Maria Pilar Del Gordillo Carrillo remained unidentified until 2024, when authorities used genetic genealogy and reopened her case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Esther Gonzalez was killed in 1979 while walking in Riverside. Randy Williamson, cleared by polygraph, lived freely until 2014. In 2023, forensic genealogy closed the cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1991, 16-year-old Sarah Yarborough was murdered outside her school. Eyewitnesses saw a man, but it took nearly 30 years and forensic genealogy to find him.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: DNA and genealogy reveal serial killer Jerry McFadden murdered Anna Hlavka in 1979 in Portland. Featuring witness testimony, new interviews, archive footage and dramatic reconstructions.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Found murdered in a Seattle garage in July 1967, Susan Galvin remained without justice until 2018, when DNA and genetic genealogy identified her killer, Frank Wypych.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard. However, he receives competition from Lockdown when Megatron offers a bounty on Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: While chasing an Autobot traitor, Bumblebee thinks back on the time he spent with Bulkhead in the Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Unlikely matchups! It's Optimus Prime and Dinobot Grimlock vs. Blackarachnia and Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron. However, he needs to capture Bulkhead, an expert space bridge mechanic, in order to build the bridge. Megatron's ultimate goal is to take over Cybertron and eventually the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Final Battle! It's Optimus Prime and the Autobots against Megatron and the Decepticons in a fate to save both Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Sari Sumdac is coping with the newly discovered fact that she's a robot. Meanwhile, the Autobots on Earth are trying to figure out a way to warn the Autobots on Cybertron about the spy working for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Things quickly descend from bad to worse for the Autobots when Detroit is menaced by new threats. Meanwhile, Ratchet remembers his first encounter with Omega Supreme and grows frustrated with his uselessness to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Autobots are given a triple blow when one of their own is critically damaged, another is overloading destructively and the third has become an assault weapon for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Bulkhead must face off against the Constructicons and their new leader, Dirt Boss, when they decide to hold the city's oil supply hostage. Meanwhile, the other Autobots manage to capture Lugnut, but find hauling him away a more difficult task.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Unaware that he is being followed by the Elite Guard, Wasp heads to Earth to take his revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda. However, Blackarachnia has Swoop capture Wasp in her latest attempt to rid herself of her organic half. This experiment goes awry and turns Wasp into Waspinator.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave. With Porter C. Powell selling Soundwave action figures, Optimus is paranoid that the real Soundwave is out there.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: It turns out that Soundwave has trapped the Autobots in a virtual reality. Now, Sari must free them before Soundwave completely turns them into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.sub-title: This Is Why I Hate Machines
programme.desc: In an effort to speed up their return to Cybertron, Sentinel Prime has Jazz pilot the Elite Guard ship through a space storm. The storm's energies reactivate Swindle, who frees his fellow Decepticon prisoners, and the group goes on to take over the ship.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron, where Sentinel Prime has the planet on high alert. They soon end up stumbling upon a plot by Shockwave to steal Omega Supreme's Access Codes from Arcee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Autobots discover Omega Supreme's energy signal on the Moon. Rachet insists on going there right away to save him, but Prime refuses, knowing that they are too weak to fight Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Cons, mini-transformers who can be used as upgrades by their bigger brethren, crash lands on Earth. In present day, a group of children finds their ship by accident which brings the war to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The children join the Autobot team and head out on their first mission to find a newly waking minicon. The Decepticons arrive to combat them. Optimus Prime finds his old minicon partner.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The next minicon alert is from Antarctica. Starscream retrieves the minicon, but has it stolen from him. Hot Shot learns a lesson in cooperation.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it, and the conflict sets the trees alight. The Autobots attempt to battle the blaze, while Starscream finally acquires his own minicon.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Rad and Carlos smuggle their minicons out of the base to visit the town's carnival. Billy and Fred see them transform and try to capture one, but are thwarted by Hot Shot.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: In an ancient palace deep beneath the Sahara another minicon is waking, but who will reach it first - the children or the Decepticon Demolishor?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons. Fred and Billy are officially introduced to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The latest minicon re-activates in the subway system of a large city, and there's the usual scramble to see which side can get to it first. And a new transformer makes himself known - but which side is he on?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war. The latest minicon alert leads the team to a volcanic island: the volcano erupts in the middle of the usual 'Bot vs 'Con battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: he Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base, and attempt to take the other two minicons that, with the one Megatron captured on the island, combine to make the supremely powerful Star Sabre. Can Hot Shot save the day?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre, but the arrival of a new Decepticon proves him overconfident. The Decepticons acquire the first of another three combining minicons which transform into the ultimate form of defence.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre, but the arrival of a new Decepticon proves him overconfident. The Decepticons acquire the first of another three combining minicons which transform into the ultimate form of defence.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel, and the race is on to see who reach it first. Hot Shot is becoming more proficient with the Star Sabre. A new transformer arrives, claiming to be an Autobot, but Rad has his doubts.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel, and the race is on to see who reach it first. Hot Shot is becoming more proficient with the Star Sabre. A new transformer arrives, claiming to be an Autobot, but Rad has his doubts.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon. The battle resumes, but Hot Shot is betrayed, and Starscream gains the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon. The battle resumes, but Hot Shot is betrayed, and Starscream gains the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: With the loss of the Star Sabre, the Autobots keep losing battles. In a fog-bound valley, Megatron plots to get the Sabre from Starscream, at the same time boosting his crew's confidence in himself. Scavenger's secret is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: With the loss of the Star Sabre, the Autobots keep losing battles. In a fog-bound valley, Megatron plots to get the Sabre from Starscream, at the same time boosting his crew's confidence in himself. Scavenger's secret is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons face off amongst snowy mountains in the battle for the latest minicon. Despite using the Star Sabre, this time Megatron loses - and Scavenger finally gains the Autobots' trust.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons face off amongst snowy mountains in the battle for the latest minicon. Despite using the Star Sabre, this time Megatron loses - and Scavenger finally gains the Autobots' trust.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: A weekend's camping trip to the valley below the dam goes wrong when a violent storm moves in. With Red Alert trapped in a mudslide, the sluice gates about to open, and local reporter Kelly filming, how will the Autobots escape detection?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: A weekend's camping trip to the valley below the dam goes wrong when a violent storm moves in. With Red Alert trapped in a mudslide, the sluice gates about to open, and local reporter Kelly filming, how will the Autobots escape detection?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Autobot Blurr joins the team, but proves himself not much of a team player. The Decepticons acquire the final minicon to create the Skyboom Shield, the most powerful defensive weapon in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Autobot Blurr joins the team, but proves himself not much of a team player. The Decepticons acquire the final minicon to create the Skyboom Shield, the most powerful defensive weapon in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle. However, when all seems lost Optimus' minicon summons the Skyboom Shield to protect his master.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle. However, when all seems lost Optimus' minicon summons the Skyboom Shield to protect his master.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The Decepticons lose another battle: Megatron takes out his frustration on Starscream, beating him half to death for no reason. Sideways uses the situation to try to foment unrest and rebellion.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Trapped in cyberspace with Sideways, Alexis, Rad, Carlos and their minicons become aware of a massive evil entity, far more powerful and dangerous than Megatron, lurking threateningly in the background. Or was it all a dream?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Trapped in cyberspace with Sideways, Alexis, Rad, Carlos and their minicons become aware of a massive evil entity, far more powerful and dangerous than Megatron, lurking threateningly in the background. Or was it all a dream?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command - and seriously underestimates the Decepticons. But on the verge of defeat, Optimus reveals a new ability.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command - and seriously underestimates the Decepticons. But on the verge of defeat, Optimus reveals a new ability.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron. On earth, despite Jetfire saying he's one of the good guys, the kids are suspicious of Sideways - as are the Decepticons. And something huge and ominous is approaching earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron. On earth, despite Jetfire saying he's one of the good guys, the kids are suspicious of Sideways - as are the Decepticons. And something huge and ominous is approaching earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr. Alexis discovers three new minicons, which Sideways says combine to create another ultimate weapon, the Requiem Blaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr. Alexis discovers three new minicons, which Sideways says combine to create another ultimate weapon, the Requiem Blaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The kids try to gather the three Requiem Blaster minicons together. Sky Blast at first resists, then sings the others to him to save Optimus. They all realise there's more to the minicons than first appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: The kids try to gather the three Requiem Blaster minicons together. Sky Blast at first resists, then sings the others to him to save Optimus. They all realise there's more to the minicons than first appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Understanding that the minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, the kids sneak the new team out of the base. Thrust finds them, but so do the Autobots who save the day. It's agreed the minicons should not be forced to fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Understanding that the minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, the kids sneak the new team out of the base. Thrust finds them, but so do the Autobots who save the day. It's agreed the minicons should not be forced to fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough. Wheeljack takes Sideswipe hostage, but Hot Shot rescues him. On the moon, Megatron welcomes Wheeljack to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough. Wheeljack takes Sideswipe hostage, but Hot Shot rescues him. On the moon, Megatron welcomes Wheeljack to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre. To prove he's genuine, he gives the Autobots details of the moon base. Red Alert works on what's left of Smokescreen.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre. To prove he's genuine, he gives the Autobots details of the moon base. Red Alert works on what's left of Smokescreen.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Det Handler Om Henry
programme.desc: Henry er en succesrig advokat, der altid vil vinde, også selvom det går ud over familien. Et enkelt skud sætter dog en stopper for Henrys karriere og efterlader ham ude af stand til at tage vare på sig selv og uden erindring om livet, han levede før.

programme.title: Delta Farce
programme.desc: Tre uheldige fyre forveksles fejlagtigt med soldater fra reserven og sendes med et militærfly til Irak for efterfølgende at blive kastet ud i en Humvee et sted over Mexico.

programme.title: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: Den hurtigtsnakkende Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) har udset sig Newage-guruen dr. Sinja. Men efter et mystisk Bodhi-træ dukker op i hans have, indser Jack, at han hellere må forbedre sig, før det sidste blad falder af træet, ellers er han færdig.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: Byen Stepford har en hemmelighed. Alle hustruerne er alt for perfekte og alle mændene er alt for lykkelige. Denne komiske thriller er en genindspilning af den spændende klassiker fra 1975. Velkommen til Stepford- den amerikanske drøm.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Paris, Texas
programme.desc: ‘Paris, Texas’ er formentlig Wim wenders’ mest kendte og succesfulde film. Filmen fortæller historien om Travis, en mand der er fortabt i sit eget private helvede. Travis har været formodet død i flere år, men dukker op ved Mexicos grænse

programme.title: The Two Jakes
programme.desc: I denne efterfølger til Chinatown (1974) efterforsker Jake Gittes utroskab og mord - og de penge, der kommer fra olie.

programme.title: Shivers
programme.desc: A cult favorite, Shivers is David Cronenberg's feature-length debut about parasites invading a luxury apartment complex and turning its residents into violent, sex-crazed maniacs.

programme.title: Shivers
programme.desc: A cult favorite, Shivers is David Cronenberg's feature-length debut about parasites invading a luxury apartment complex and turning its residents into violent, sex-crazed maniacs.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest
programme.desc: Udadtil var Crawford viljestærk, glamourøs og beundringsværdig, men "Mommie Dearest" afslører den private Crawford, kvinden, der var desperat efter at være mor og adopterede børn, mens hun var enlig og prøvede at overleve i en knusende filmindustri.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest
programme.desc: Udadtil var Crawford viljestærk, glamourøs og beundringsværdig, men "Mommie Dearest" afslører den private Crawford, kvinden, der var desperat efter at være mor og adopterede børn, mens hun var enlig og prøvede at overleve i en knusende filmindustri.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Don't Come Knocking
programme.sub-title: Wim Wenders Collection: Don't Come Knocking
programme.desc: En aldrende cowboyfilmstjerne forlader et filmset og genoptager kontakten til sin mor, som han ikke har set i 30 år, kun for finde ud af, at han har et barn, han aldrig har hørt om.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Don't Come Knocking

programme.desc: En aldrende cowboyfilmstjerne forlader et filmset og genoptager kontakten til sin mor, som han ikke har set i 30 år, kun for finde ud af, at han har et barn, han aldrig har hørt om.

programme.title: Le Mans
programme.desc: Steve McQueen spiller en amerikansk racerkører, som deltager i 24 TIMERS LE MANS, i denne hurtige og voldsomme originale film. Filmen er optaget forskellige steder på Le Mans-banen og byder på imponerende bilulykke-stunts og hæsblæsende action.

programme.desc: In their makeshift laboratory, three boys use an amazing discovery and their ingenuity to build their own spaceship and launch themselves on a fantastic interplanetary journey.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the FBI is called in to investigate a series of home invasions, the team uses Charlie and his math skills to help profile the suspects, but when his calculations go awry during a raid, Don suffers a life-threatening injury.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Still feeling responsible for Don's near-fatal stabbing, Charlie puts his focus into tracking down an unnoticed serial killer, with the agents revisiting math theories from when Charlie first started working with the team to help solve the case.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate a string of copycat bank robberies and zero in on disgraced FBI Agent Roger Bloom as a suspect when they discover he has been studying the files of some of the original bank heists.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Amita is abducted, Don and the team's frantic search for her leads them to a charismatic sociopath, but it is up to a distraught Charlie to discover what the suspect's bizarre plans for her are on the fifth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team must protect high-profile activist Benjamin Polk at a political rally, but it soon becomes a manhunt when they search for a sniper trying to kill Polk. Also, Charlie awaits an answer from Amita, on the sixth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When two FBI agents, part of a unit headed by Don's former mentor, are killed during a shootout with bank robbers, the team must investigate what exactly happened. Also, Charlie and Amita worry when Larry opts not to attend a conference in Geneva.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team are called in to investigate who is behind a deadly gambling ring that is running a high-stakes Russian roulette tournament. Also, Don and Charlie become concerned about Alan's financial health.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team searches for a geneticist's daughter who they suspect was abducted by her unstable mother but become more concerned when they think the young girl may be a clone. Also, Charlie and Amita talk about having kids and Liz reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When strange, almost paranormal happenings are observed at a decommissioned air base, the spooky occurrences take on a decidedly different tone when the team is brought in to investigate the mystery of a dead woman found there.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team conducts an undercover sting to locate a cyber crime lord, but the operation is foiled by a charming, brilliant hacker whose desire to take over the online black markets puts him in a dangerous online turf war that could lead to murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While tracking down a felon running a heroin ring inside a prison, Agent Ian Edgerton becomes a murder suspect when the informant he meets with ends up dead, sending a desperate Edgerton over the edge when he takes a member of Don's team hostage.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When robbers hit a diamond exchange and take hostages, Don and the team find an unlikely ally in convict John Buckley, who may help the team's investigation when they believe the men are copying Buckley's criminal strategies.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the team foils a robbery of an armored car full of Federal Reserve money and recover bills that trace back to the infamous D.B. Cooper heist, they call on Agent Roger Bloom, who worked on the Cooper case, for help with the investigation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team try their luck at investigating the theft of scratch-off lottery tickets, but the stakes are raised when one of the culprits killed at a botched robbery turns out to be a former lottery winner.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team searches for a lost shipment of high-caliber firearms when one of the weapons is responsible for random killings throughout the city. Also, Charlie and Amita disagree on a wedding date while Don re-evaluates his relationship with Robin.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team searches for a serial killer who is targeting men who solicit prostitutes. Also, Colby and Nikki deal with the aftermath of a car crash when they have an accident during the investigation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team gets a taste of the limelight when they search for jewels worth millions that have been stolen during an awards show broadcast. Also, Don revisits an old case that is haunting him, and Larry returns from his adventure in the desert.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team gets a taste of the limelight when they search for jewels worth millions that have been stolen during an awards show broadcast. Also, Don revisits an old case that is haunting him, and Larry returns from his adventure in the desert.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team investigates the deaths of two men who were part of a group of friends that had been sexually assaulted by a teacher when they were young boys.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team investigates the deaths of two men who were part of a group of friends that had been sexually assaulted by a teacher when they were young boys.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie and Amita get married and begin preparations for their London adventure, but they put a slight hold on their plans when they assist Don to track down the whereabouts of his gun after it goes missing, on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie and Amita get married and begin preparations for their London adventure, but they put a slight hold on their plans when they assist Don to track down the whereabouts of his gun after it goes missing, on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Pilot
programme.desc: I premiäravsnittet har Don bråttom at fånga en serievåldtäktsman som har börjat mörda sina offer. Charlie rekryteras av Don för att hjälpa till att spåra mördaren.

programme.desc: A photographer in turn-of-the-century New Orleans takes pictures of prostitutes, and eventually falls for one hooker's prepubescent daughter. A memorable film debut for Shields at 12.

programme.title: Trinity klipper till igen
programme.desc: Västerns värsta vildhjärnor rider tillsammans igen och då blir västern verkligen vild. De är bröderna som din mamma varnade dig för. Och din doktor! Och alla begravningsbyråer! Och framförallt läkarna som måste ta hand om alla som skrattat käkarna ur led!

programme.title: Mrs Henderson Presents
programme.desc: En eksentrisk enke åpner et teater med dristige revyforestillinger, som utfordrer moralen i et krigsherjet 1930-talls London.

programme.title: The Curse of the Jade Scorpion
programme.sub-title: The Curse of the Jade Scorpion
programme.desc: C.W. Biggs er forsikringsetterforsker i 1940-tallets New York. I hans egne øyne er han byens beste, ikke minst fordi han påstår å kunne knekke enhver forsikringssvindel ved å gå inn i tankene til svindleren.

programme.title: Wagons East
programme.desc: De var ute etter gull, men nå tar de til takke med innlagt vann. John Candy og Richard Lewis spiller i dette hysterisk ukonvensjonelle blikket på den legendariske ville vesten.

programme.title: Easy Come, Easy Go (1967)
programme.desc: On his last day in the Navy, frogman Elvis discovers a sunken treasure ship. On his first day as a civilian, Elvis starts his new job—self-employed treasure hunter!

programme.title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
programme.sub-title: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
programme.desc: Velkommen til en katolsk jenteskole i hjertet av Chicago, hjemstedet til USAs favorittdanseshow: Dance TV! Utvekslingsstudenten Janey Glenn er et nervevrak når hun blir introdusert for sine fnisende klassekamerater av den strenge søster Katherine.

programme.title: Disaster Movie
programme.desc: DISASTER MOVIE fortsetter den komiske nedturen til din yndlingsgruppe med latterlig attraktive 20-åringer. En skjebnesvanger natt prøver de å komme seg i trygghet mens enhver kjent naturkatastrofe, knuser byen og deres vei.

programme.title: Black Moon Rising
programme.desc: Fest sikkerhetsbeltet for en fantastisk tur i Black Moon, en høyteknologisk, aerodynamisk superbil som kan nå en topphastighet på 560 km/t. Det er i dette fartsvidunderet at CIAs mestertyv Sam Quint tilfeldigvis skjuler en hemmelig datadisk

programme.title: Bleeder
programme.desc: Louise elsker Leo dypt, hjertelig og uforbeholdent og lykkelig glad når hun oppdager hun er gravid. Men for Leo er det uplanlagte svangerskapet, Det fører til at koppen strømmer over.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Når den korrupte romerske lederen Tiberius med en stor hær forsøker å gjøre krav på Silkeveien, må Huo An og hans gruppe trente krigere alliere seg med en elitehær av romerske soldater ledet av general Lucius.

programme.title: Dragon Blade
programme.desc: Når den korrupte romerske lederen Tiberius med en stor hær forsøker å gjøre krav på Silkeveien, må Huo An og hans gruppe trente krigere alliere seg med en elitehær av romerske soldater ledet av general Lucius.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King...but his business may be grounded.

programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King...but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Blue Chips
programme.desc: Pete Bell, en college-baskettrener, er under mye press. Laget hans vinner ikke. Fremtidens stjerner blir betalt av andre lag. Denne praksisen er forbudt i college-spillet, men Pete er desperat og har press fra alle sider.

programme.title: Le Mans
programme.desc: Steve McQueen er en amerikansk racersjåfør i 24-TIMERSLØPET PÅ LE MANS i denne heseblesende originalfilmen, som er filmet på Le Mans-banen, med bilstunt som gir deg hakeslepp og action som får hjertet til å banke.

programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.desc: En butikkmedarbeider oppdager en mystisk plante med en blodtørstig appetitt. Suksess følger, men prisen viser seg å være menneskeliv, og situasjonen eskalerer.

programme.desc: Mens Tim drømte om å jobbe i justisdepartementet, ønsket Peter å bli en sterk politisk aktør - for enhver pris.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Lett synlig
programme.desc: Megan og et team med FBI-agenter avslører en stor metamfetamin-lab, men de mister lederen da han detonerer en bombe, stikker av og dreper en av agentene under Megans kommando.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Giftstoff
programme.desc: En tidligere kjemiker ved et stort farmasøytisk selskap har tuklet med noen medisiner, og Don og Megan må finne ham.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Helt inn til beina
programme.desc: Da en ung forsker ved Heritage Museum blir funnet død, kalles Don og Megan inn for å etterforske dødsfallet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Forbrent
programme.desc: Don og teamet må finne brannstifteren som står bak en uskyldig manns død. "Bill Nye the Science Guy" har gjesterolle som professor Waldie, som hjelper Charlie og Larry med å gjenskape backdraft-effekten ved Cal Scis laboratorium.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Gangster
programme.desc: Da en FBI-agent som jobber undercover blir drept i et gjengoppgjør, må Don og teamet etterforske saken.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Satsning
programme.desc: Da FBI kalles inn for å etterforske et drap ved en pokerklubb i Los Angeles, avslører Don og agentene en komplisert korttellingsplan der en gruppe collegestudenter, hvis liv nå står i fare, er innblandet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Innhøsting
programme.desc: Etter å ha avdekket at en ung kvinnelig immigrant døde da hun solgte en av nyrene sine, må agentene stoppe et nettverk som selger organer.

programme.title: Numb3rs: På flukt
programme.desc: En naturfagsstudent ved Cal Sci blir mistenkt da en dyr maskin blir stjålet fra skolens DNA-lab.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Protest
programme.desc: En anti-krig-bombe som dreper en uskyldig mann blir en personlig affære da etterforskningen avdekker overraskende informasjon om fortiden til Don og Charlies far.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Psykologisk spill
programme.desc: Da en synsk mann fører myndighetene til et drapssted, prøver Charlie å bevise at det var en ren tilfeldighet. John Glover spiller Samuel Kraft, en synsk mann som leder letemannskapet til et åsted i villmarken.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Alt er lov
programme.desc: Da en kvinnelig aktivist fra Irak blir drept på amerikansk jord, etterforsker FBI drapet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Mørk materie
programme.desc: Don og teamet etterforsker en skoleskyting, men blir overrasket av en av de mistenkte.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Våpen og roser
programme.desc: Don tar en nærmere titt på livet sitt etter at han etterforsker omstendighetene rundt en tidligere kjærestes dødsfall.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Berserk
programme.desc: Da en bevæpnet gjerningsperson stormer FBI-kontoret, havner Charlie i kryssilden mellom den mistenkte og FBI-agentene.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Retur
programme.desc: FBI etterforsker datasvindel, og det blir personlig for Don da den russiske mafiaen, som står bak svindelen, kommer etter ham og truer Charlie og Alan.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Understrøm
programme.desc: Don ber Charlie om hjelp da fem unge asiatiske jenter som blir funnet døde i vannkanten, mistenkes å ha fugleinfluensa.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Understrøm
programme.desc: Don ber Charlie om hjelp da fem unge asiatiske jenter som blir funnet døde i vannkanten, mistenkes å ha fugleinfluensa.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Storkar
programme.desc: I avslutningen av sesong to må Don og teamet stoppe en mistenkt seriemorder som doper ned og dreper unge kvinner. JoBeth Williams spiller den avdødde Margaret Eppes, og Olympia Dukakis spiller Charlotte Yates, moren til en av de mistenkte.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Um bombista em série está à solta. Será que a equipe junta com o antigo mentor do esquadrão antibombas do Caine estará apta a desvendar o quebra-cabeças pra encontrar o bombista?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Um braço no esôfago de um tubarão e uma garota que foi atirada no mar leva a equipe a um contrabandista que está com refugiados cubanos e cocaína num navio naufragado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Um homem morto com a garganta cortada e um rosto parcialmente queimado é descoberto numa praia de Miami, junto a uma jovem garota inconsciente que foi espancada e jogada no oceano.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Quando um padre é encontrado morto em sua reitoria após ser brutalmente baleado, Megan, Calleigh e Speedle devem desatar essa teia bagunçada de problemas familiares que levam morte dele.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Toda a equipe investiga a cena de um crime em um parque de diversões quando uma garota é encontrada morta no banheiro.
